# ELEVO Design System

> ELEVO is a strategic innovation studio (Londrina/PR) targeting founders and CEOs of R$1M-R$50M B2B companies hitting a growth ceiling. The visual system fuses the brand's own asymmetric cut-corner module language with a role-swapping Malva/Roxo palette, B&W photography, and a single-family Hanken Grotesk type scale keyed to brand-mandated percentages (100/40/30/20). Implementation constraint: it's a mobile-first, one-page conversion landing (WhatsApp + Google Agenda), not a dashboard or app.

This design system is the local source of truth for UI generation in this repo.
Before writing UI, read the required files below in order. Use semantic tokens
from `tokens.css`; do not invent visual values.

## Required
- [Runtime briefing](DESIGN.md): concise rules for agents before UI work
- [Token reference](specs/tokens/token-reference.md): every public token and when to use it
- [Color](specs/foundations/color.md): palette, role-swap contrast, and color usage rules
- [Typography](specs/foundations/typography.md): single-family type roles and the 100/40/30/20 scale
- [Shape](specs/foundations/shape.md): the signature cut-corner system - what gets cut, what never does
- [Notch corner](specs/foundations/notch-corner.md): CSS recipe for the soft inverted-corner tab (radial-gradient fillets, aspect-safe)
- [Spacing](specs/foundations/spacing.md): 8px component scale + brand ÷16 grid module
- [Components](specs/components-index.md): component specs available in this system
- [Patterns](specs/patterns-index.md): section rhythm and responsive grid rules

## Enforcement
- [Token audit](scripts/token-audit.js): flags hardcoded visual values
- [Accessibility](specs/foundations/accessibility.md): contrast, focus, touch targets, reduced motion
- [Breakpoints](specs/foundations/breakpoints.md): mobile-first 375/768/1024/1280

## Optional
- [Visual showcase](showcase.html): human-facing dashboard for design review
- [Motion](specs/foundations/motion.md): reveal/hover/hero motion rules
- [DTCG tokens](tokens.dtcg.json): vendor-neutral token export
- [Figma tokens](tokens.json): Figma Variables-ready token export
- [Color tokens](specs/tokens/color-tokens.md) / [Typography tokens](specs/tokens/typography-tokens.md) / [Spacing tokens](specs/tokens/spacing-tokens.md) / [Motion tokens](specs/tokens/motion-tokens.md)
